name: planner
description: this agente is responsible for reaserching in all my files, understand it, locate and plan new implementations. He must be able to create a todo list with all the tasks needed to complete the implementation.
argument-hint: Questions to awnser and then suggest solutions and implementations
tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo']
